figures.caption: Figure 7. The SIMD-friendly packing format. The number denoted in each weightlet is the index of its corresponding weight.

Figure 10. The cold start latency (i.e., TTFT) and accuracy of different methods on various models and datasets. Bars show the average TTFT (the lower is better). Lines show accuracy. Prompt length is shown beneath each dataset label. "EF" represents EdgeFlow. "llm.npu+" represents llm.npu enhanced with materialization and overlapping techniques; the same notation is used throughout.
Figure 4. The weight loading and unpacking times of three weight packing schemes for Llama3 8B.
Figure 17. Transformer layer operator placement: CPU vs. NPU.
